title: Gregg Rickman and Others on Philip K. Dick (Review)
author: Istvan Csicsery-Ronay, Jr.
card_summary: Review essay by Istvan Csicsery-Ronay, Jr. in Science Fiction Studies (Vol. 22, No. 3, November 1995) reviewing Samuel J. Umland's "Philip K. Dick: Contemporary Critical Interpretations" alongside Gregg Rickman's contributions to Dick scholarship.
